evidence: skill survey: loaded skill list considered; relevant skills read/used: omo:ulw-loop (durable evidence loop), browser (manual browser QA if UI surface exists), computer-use (desktop GUI fallback only), omo:programming + python reference (Python implementation), omo:lsp (diagnostics), skill-creator (optional skill packaging), external-db project skill pattern, pcie/nvme/ucie skill patterns, Karpathy wiki docs. wiki/code-review/ai-slop-cleaner installed-list paths are currently absent except backups, so fallback will use native reviewer/available scripts.

goals.title: Build an optional Andes RTL DB LLM Wiki / knowledge graph under /User...
goals.objective: Build an optional Andes RTL DB LLM Wiki / knowledge graph under /Users/brian/Desktop/andes and common_ai_agent integration so agents can consult it like pcie/nvme/ucie skills. Use pyslang AST-level extraction for RTL constructs including modules, ports, parameters, FSMs, datapaths, registers, memories, features, clocks, resets; convert existing docs into LLM wiki pages; support on/off via environment/config; provide reusable script and guide for other RTL DBs; verify with RED→GREEN tests and real usage scenarios.

Use pyslang AST-level extraction for RTL constructs including modules, ports, parameters, FSMs, datapaths, registers, memories, features, clocks, resets; convert existing docs into LLM wiki pages; support on/off via environment/config; provide reusable script and guide for other RTL DBs; verify with RED→GREEN tests and real usage scenarios.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux happy path: build a temp RTL DB wiki from a synthetic SystemVerilog corpus with docs, then inspect generated markdown, _rtl_facts JSON, and _graph.json for pyslang-derived modules, ports, parameters, clocks, resets, registers, memories, FSM candidates, datapath expressions, features, and document wiki pages.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d68-e85d-7b32-af8c-a77d3f0b01ae/evidence/C001-ast-doc-build.txt contains the tmux transcript plus cleanup receipt; supporting pytest RED/GREEN evidence in .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d68-e85d-7b32-af8c-a77d3f0b01ae/evidence/C001-pytest.txt.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux edge path: build from a temp RTL DB containing one malformed SystemVerilog file and an empty hdl directory; the builder must not crash, must emit diagnostics in _rtl_facts, must still emit doc inventory/page artifacts, and graph build must complete.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d68-e85d-7b32-af8c-a77d3f0b01ae/evidence/C002-malformed-empty-build.txt contains tmux transcript with non-crashing builder output, diagnostics JSON inspection, graph build result, and cleanup receipt; supporting pytest evidence in C002-pytest.txt.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux regression/use path: set ATLAS_RTL_DB_WIKI to the generated wiki, verify wiki_query(ip='rtl-db'/'andes') returns AST/doc facts; unset it and verify the on/off path reports missing config; run existing wiki_query external DB tests to prove builder/no-rebuild/query-adapter contracts still work; inspect the agent skill/guide for env-variable reuse instructions.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d68-e85d-7b32-af8c-a77d3f0b01ae/evidence/C003-wiki-query-on-off.txt contains tmux transcript with wiki_query enabled output, disabled output, skill/guide grep checks, pytest regression command, and cleanup receipt.

after.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d68-e85d-7b32-af8c-a77d3f0b01ae/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d68-e85d-7b32-af8c-a77d3f0b01ae/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

after.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d68-e85d-7b32-af8c-a77d3f0b01ae/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d68-e85d-7b32-af8c-a77d3f0b01ae/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

evidence: Codex get_goal returns a completed prior Atlas report-crash goal rather than this aggregate objective, and create_goal previously failed because that completed goal remains attached to the thread. The prior goal status is complete, so execution continues under the ulw-loop ledger without calling update_goal until final gate; no active incomplete Codex goal is being displaced.
message: Preserve audit trail for Codex goal integration mismatch caused by an uncleared completed goal.

steering.evidence: Codex get_goal returns a completed prior Atlas report-crash goal rather than this aggregate objective, and create_goal previously failed because that completed goal remains attached to the thread. The prior goal status is complete, so execution continues under the ulw-loop ledger without calling update_goal until final gate; no active incomplete Codex goal is being displaced.
steering.rationale: Preserve audit trail for Codex goal integration mismatch caused by an uncleared completed goal.
